header.title: PDF Templates
header.description: Design PDF documents like certificates and letters, filled with each response's answers

blank.title: Start from a blank page
blank.description: Design on an empty A4 page

upload.title: Upload a PDF
upload.description: Design on top of an existing PDF (max 10MB)

createDialog.blankDescription: Give your template a name to start designing.
createDialog.uploadDescription: Using "{{fileName}}" as the base PDF. Give your template a name to start designing.

empty.title: No PDF templates yet
empty.description: Create your first template from a blank page or an uploaded PDF.
empty.viewerDescription: No PDF templates have been created for this form yet.

deleteDialog.title: Delete PDF template?
deleteDialog.description: "{{name}}" will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.

designer.basePdfUnavailable: The base PDF could not be loaded

fieldsPanel.heading: Form fields
fieldsPanel.description: Click a field to place its response value on the page. You can place the same field multiple times.
fieldsPanel.noFields: This form has no fields yet.

generate.dialogDescription: Choose a template to fill with this response's answers.
generate.noTemplates: No PDF templates exist for this form yet. Create one from the form dashboard.

toasts.deletedDescription: The PDF template has been removed.
toasts.fileTooLargeDescription: Base PDFs can be at most 10MB.
toasts.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

formNotFound.title: Form not found
formNotFound.description: The form you're looking for doesn't exist or you don't have access to it.

templateNotFound.title: Template not found
templateNotFound.description: The PDF template you're looking for doesn't exist or you don't have access to it.
